disableConfirmMessage: Disable two-factor authentication? You will no longer be asked for a code when signing in.
disabledHelp: Add an extra layer of security to your account with an authenticator app (e.g. Google Authenticator).
enabledHelp: Two-factor authentication is enabled. You'll need to enter a code from your authenticator app when signing in.
enrollFailed: Failed to start setup. Please try again
loginChallengeSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code shown in your authenticator app
manualEntryLabel: Can't scan the QR code? Enter this key manually instead
qrCodeAlt: QR code to scan with your authenticator app
setupInstructions: Scan the QR code with an authenticator app such as Google Authenticator, then enter the 6-digit code it shows.
setupTitle: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app
title: Two-Factor Authentication
unenrollFailed: Failed to disable. Please try again
